widget.name: MG Enterprise Receiver
widget.description: Locked-down receiver for a local MG Enterprise controller.
widget.tizen:content-security-policy: default-src 'self' http: https: data: blob:; script-src 'self' http: https: 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval'; style-src 'self' http: https: 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' http: https: data: blob:; connect-src 'self' http: https: ws: wss:; media-src 'self' http: https: data: blob:; font-src 'self' http: https: data:; frame-src 'self' http: https: about: data:; worker-src 'self' http: https: blob:; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self' http: https:; form-action 'none'
